query: SELECT id, name, sku, myCostUsd, fobLevel1, fobLevel2, fobLevel3 FROM products WHERE myCostUsd IS NOT NULL AND myCostUsd != '' AND deletedAt IS NULL LIMIT 10
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2Wfg8FxM46VuY92.2046134b715b --database 5QtmwQJEy7EFv8QJHVh9i8 --execute SELECT id, name, sku, myCostUsd, fobLevel1, fobLevel2, fobLevel3 FROM products WHERE myCostUsd IS NOT NULL AND myCostUsd != '' AND deletedAt IS NULL LIMIT 10
